title: lifesteal datapack
body:
# Lifesteal datapack ## what is this? this datapack is used for a server or a single player world to make it more fun (recommend on a server) ## Recipes / Info ### Heart This item would rest your heart back to ten (if your heart is lower)

NOTE: if you use this item the item would still dissapper if you have your heart higher than 10

To craft this item you would only need 1 totem of undying and put it anywhere in a crafting table ### Revive When you craft this item it would dissapper and you would gain 1 revives (You only)

NOTE: This item will activate when you at live 1

To craft this item you would need 9 totem of undying and sort of make a block in a crafting table. ## Requirement This datapack need the Function permission level to be at level 3
